description: Individual instrument tag (pressure transmitter, temperature element, flow meter, etc.) mounted on plant equipment. Maps 1:1 to a row in dbo.Sensors and streams telemetry from dbo.SensorReadings.

contents.name: tagId
contents.description: Instrument tag identifier following ISA-5.1 naming (e.g. A-K100-PT-001)

contents.name: parameterType
contents.description: Measured variable: Pressure | Temperature | Flow | RPM | Power | Level

contents.name: unitOfMeasure
contents.description: Engineering unit (e.g. bar, °C, MMSCFD, RPM, kW, %)

contents.name: normalMin
contents.description: Lower bound of normal operating range

contents.name: normalMax
contents.description: Upper bound of normal operating range

contents.name: value
contents.description: Latest process value in engineering units

contents.name: quality
contents.description: OPC UA quality code: 192 = Good, 64 = Uncertain, 0 = Bad

contents.name: timestamp
contents.description: UTC timestamp of the sensor reading

contents.name: alarmStatus
contents.description: Current alarm state: NORMAL | HIGH | LOW | ALARM-H | ALARM-L

contents.name: deviationPercent
contents.description: How far the current value deviates from the midpoint of the normal range, expressed as a percentage of the half-range. Computed in Silver layer.
